use_cases: Interactive hero section background that responds to mouse movement
Dynamic landing page visual element with trailing particle effects
Creative portfolio or agency site with gooey blob animations
Gamified UI element for engagement on marketing pages
Interactive decorative background for web applications
ai_summary: A canvas-based particle animation component featuring a gooey blob effect that follows the user's cursor. Creates colorful particles with physics-based movement and SVG gooey filters for a blobby, organic trailing effect. Highly interactive with configurable colors, particle count, and follow strength. Best used as an engaging visual element in hero sections or landing pages.
